Residential Stucco in McLennan County, TX

McLennan County is experiencing a revival, with Waco's renewed popularity driving investment in homes across the region. Star Stucco of Austin installs residential stucco systems for homeowners in Waco, Hewitt, Woodway, and surrounding communities — durable, attractive finishes that handle the demands of the I-35 corridor climate.

Get a Free EstimateCall (512) 706-9699

Stucco for McLennan County's Revitalized Housing Market

McLennan County sits along the Brazos River at the northern reach of our Central Texas service area. Waco's resurgence — fueled by Baylor University, a growing downtown, and national attention from renovation culture — has brought new energy to the local housing market. Homeowners are investing in their properties, and stucco is a popular exterior choice for both new construction and renovations.

The county's Blackland Prairie soils, hot summers, and occasional severe thunderstorms with hail create conditions that test every exterior material. Stucco's fire resistance, impact tolerance, and design versatility make it well suited for McLennan County homes, from historic neighborhoods near the Brazos to modern developments in Hewitt and China Spring.

Our crew makes regular trips to McLennan County and understands the local building conditions. We adjust our approach for the heavier clay soils in the eastern portions and the more mixed terrain near Lake Waco and the western hills.

What's Included With Our Residential Stucco in McLennan County

Every project includes expert craftsmanship, quality materials, and a commitment to lasting results.

Home Exterior Evaluation

We inspect your walls, substrate, foundation type, and site drainage to specify the stucco system best suited for your McLennan County home.

Surface Prep & Barrier Installation

Substrates are cleaned and prepped, and a weather-resistive barrier is installed to protect against McLennan County's heavy rains and storm-driven moisture.

Lath & Scratch Coat

Metal lath is fastened to the substrate and a keyed scratch coat is applied. We place control joints at stress-prone locations to prevent cracking.

Brown Coat Build-Up

The brown coat levels the wall surface and builds the stucco to proper thickness for durability and quality finish application.

Finish Coat & Detailing

Your chosen texture and color are applied with precision. We match the finish style to your home's architecture and the surrounding neighborhood character.

Walkthrough & Warranty

We review the finished work with you, clean the site completely, and provide warranty documentation and maintenance tips.

Common Residential Stucco Needs in McLennan County

McLennan County homeowners come to us for stucco that improves their homes' appearance and durability in a market where property investment is paying off.

Renovation & Remodel Stucco

Waco's renovation boom means many homeowners are updating exteriors. Stucco gives older homes a clean, modern look while adding real weather protection.

New Construction in Growing Areas

Builders in Hewitt, Woodway, China Spring, and Robinson trust us for new-home stucco installations that meet schedules and quality standards.

Historic District Compatibility

Waco's historic neighborhoods have distinct character. We apply stucco finishes that complement the era and style of the home while providing modern performance.

Hail & Storm Damage Resilience

McLennan County sits in a severe weather corridor. Our stucco systems include impact-resistant basecoats that absorb hail impacts without crumbling.

Clay Soil Movement Management

The Blackland clay across much of McLennan County causes foundation shifts. We use reinforced lath and properly placed control joints to keep stucco intact as the ground moves.

Why Choose Us for Residential Stucco in McLennan County?

  • Regular service to McLennan County with crews familiar with Waco, Hewitt, and Woodway
  • Stucco systems designed for Blackland clay, hail exposure, and Central Texas heat
  • Honest evaluations — we document what we find and explain it clearly
  • Neat crews who respect your property, neighbors, and neighborhood character
  • Impact-resistant, UV-stable finishes proven in storm-prone Central Texas
  • Free estimates with no obligation or high-pressure follow-up

Licensed & Insured

Full liability coverage and workers' compensation for every project in McLennan County.

20+ Years Experience

Decades of hands-on stucco work across Central Texas residential and commercial properties.

Certified Applicators

Certified by Sto Corp, Senergy/BASF, Master Wall, Dryvit, and Parex LaHabra for the highest quality results.

Our Residential Stucco Process

A straightforward approach from start to finish — no surprises, no shortcuts.

1

Book a Free Estimate

Call (512) 706-9699 or contact us online. We make regular trips to McLennan County and will schedule a visit at your convenience.

2

Inspect Your Property

Our estimator examines walls, soil type, drainage, and storm exposure to develop a tailored stucco plan for your home.

3

Review the Proposal

You receive a written estimate with clear scope, material specs, timeline, and pricing — no guesswork or hidden costs.

4

Professional Installation

We complete the stucco work on schedule, communicate progress throughout, and walk the finished project with you.
